TeamID.description: The team's unique TeamID as assigned by SportsDataIO

Key.description: Abbreviation of the team (e.g. LAD, PHI, BOS, CHC, etc.)

Active.description: Whether or not this team is active

City.description: The city/location of the team (e.g. Los Angeles, Philadelphia, Boston, Chicago, etc.)

Name.description: The mascot of the team (e.g. Dodgers, Phillies, Red Sox, Cubs, etc.)

StadiumID.description: The unique ID of the team's current home stadium

League.description: The league of the team (possible values: AL, NL)

Division.description: The division of the team (e.g. East; Central; West)

PrimaryColor.description: The team's primary color. (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

SecondaryColor.description: The team's secondary color. (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

TertiaryColor.description: The team's tertiary color. (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

QuaternaryColor.description: The team's quaternary color. (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

WikipediaLogoUrl.description: The link to the team's logo hosted on Wikipedia. (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

WikipediaWordMarkUrl.description: The link to the team's wordmark logo hosted on Wikipedia. (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

GlobalTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for this team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

HeadCoach.description: The current head coach (manager) of the team

HittingCoach.description: The current hitting coach of the team. Note: some teams may have multiple or no hitting coaches

PitchingCoach.description: The current pitching coach of the team. Note: some teams may have multiple or no pitching coaches
